tagline: Pakistan's first voice-first AI health triage platform. Describe your symptoms in Urdu or English and get instant guidance.
moduleHelperText: Not sure where to start? Begin with a quick health interview and our AI will guide you to the right specialist.

hero.searchLabel: Select your city and search for a doctor, specialist, or hospital
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search by doctor, specialty, hospital or disease...
hero.quickReasonsLabel: Or choose from common health reasons:

howWeHelp.heading: How can we help you today?

interview.title: Health Interview
interview.desc: Answer a few questions and get AI-powered triage guidance instantly.

findDoctor.title: Find a Doctor
findDoctor.desc: Search verified doctors, specialists, and hospitals near you.

tts.title: Voice Assistant
tts.desc: Speak your symptoms in Urdu or English and get spoken guidance.

healthTimeline.title: Health Timeline
healthTimeline.desc: Track your medical history, visits, and health records over time.

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: SehatHub is an AI-assisted triage tool for informational purposes only. It does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical concerns.

voiceMode.activeHint: Say a command like: "symptom checker", "find doctor", "interview", "timeline", "voice assistant"
voiceMode.notUnderstood: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Please try again.
